assertions.title: Production batch creation with raw material consumption

steps.expected: Production log creation consumes raw materials via FIFO batch selection and creates FG batch with correct cost
steps.observed: Test passed: RM stock decreased from 200 to 145 (55 units consumed at 100/unit = 5500 material cost). FG batch created with unitCost=57.5000 (5500 RM + 250 packaging over 100L). Journal entries RM→WIP (5500 debit WIP, 5500 credit INV-RM) and WIP→FG (5500 debit INV-FG, 5500 credit WIP) both balanced.

steps.expected: RawMaterialMovement records linked to production log with journal entry IDs
steps.observed: rmMovements linked to RM journal (referenceType=PRODUCTION_LOG, referenceId=productionCode). All movements have correct journalEntryId.

steps.action: Verify inventory movement for semi-finished goods receipt
steps.expected: InventoryMovement RECEIPT records with correct unitCost linked to journal
steps.observed: Semi-finished movements found with movementType=RECEIPT, correct unitCost matching log.unitCost, and semiFinishedJournal.id linkage.

keyObservations: RM base stock: 200 → 145 (55 units consumed at 100/unit = 5500 total)
FG batch created with unitCost=57.5000 (material 55.00 + packaging 2.50 per liter)
Journal RM→WIP: balanced, WIP debit 5500, INV-RM credit 5500
Journal WIP→FG: balanced, INV-FG debit 5500, WIP credit 5500
RM movements linked to production log with correct journal entry ID

steps.action: Run FactoryPackagingCostingIT packing step (single-size packing: 5×20L from 100L bulk)
steps.expected: Packing deducts from parent batch, creates child FG batch, consumes packaging materials (buckets), allocates cost proportionally
steps.observed: Test passed: 5 buckets consumed (stock 10→5), packaging cost 5×50=250. FG batch unitCost=57.5000 (5500 production + 250 packaging / 100L). Packing journal balanced with FG-INV debit 5750, FG-INV credit 5500, WIP credit 250.

steps.action: Run BulkPackingBomCostingIT (multi-size BOM packing: 10×5L + 4×10L from 200L bulk)
steps.expected: Multi-component BOM per size: cans + labels consumed per size, child batches created with correct per-unit cost
steps.observed: Test passed: CAN-5L stock 50→40 (10 consumed), CAN-10L stock 50→46 (4 consumed), LABEL stock 50→36 (14 consumed: 10 for 5L + 4 for 10L). Child batch 5L unitCost=75.0000 (5L×10/unit + can@20 + label@5 = 50+20+5=75). Child batch 10L unitCost=140.0000 (10L×10/unit + can@35 + label@5 = 100+35+5=140). Packing journal balanced, packaging inventory credit 410.00.

steps.expected: RawMaterialMovement ISSUE records for packaging materials linked to packing reference with journal IDs
steps.observed: Packaging movements found with referenceType=PACKING_RECORD, all linked to packaging journal entry.

results: FactoryPackagingCostingIT: Tests run: 1, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0
BulkPackingBomCostingIT: Tests run: 1, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0
keyObservations: Single-size packing: 5×20L buckets consumed from 10→5 stock, packaging cost 250
Multi-size BOM packing: CAN-5L 50→40, CAN-10L 50→46, LABEL 50→36
Child batch 5L unitCost=75.0000, child batch 10L unitCost=140.0000
Cost allocation correct: RM cost per liter + packaging materials per unit
All packing journals balanced, packaging inventory credited 410.00

steps.expected: Product created with size variants (1L, 4L), carton mappings (1L:24, 4L:6), colors, HSN code, GST rate. SKU auto-generated from brand code.
steps.observed: Test passed: Product created with id=501, sku=BBR-EXTERIOREMUL-001, colors=[Red,Blue], sizes=[1L,4L], cartonSizes=[1L:24, 4L:6], unitOfMeasure=LITER, hsnCode=320910, gstRate=18.00, active=true.

steps.expected: Product update changes all catalog attributes including sizes and carton mappings
steps.observed: Test passed: Product updated with sizes=[10L], cartonSizes=[10L:2], hsnCode=320990, gstRate=12.00. SKU preserved (BBR-OLDNAME-001). Active set to false.

steps.expected: Products searchable/filterable by brand, color, size with pagination
steps.observed: Test passed: Paginated response with page=1, size=5, totalElements=11. Product returned with correct sizes and cartonSizes mappings. Sort by productName confirmed.

steps.expected: Bulk upsert validates cartonSizes are required; valid items succeed, invalid items fail with descriptive error
steps.observed: Test passed: 2 items submitted, 1 succeeded (CREATED with BBR- SKU), 1 failed with message 'cartonSizes mapping is required'. Per-item results returned.

steps.expected: Field-level validation for brandId, name, unitOfMeasure, hsnCode, gstRate
steps.observed: Test passed: All 5 required fields (brandId, name, unitOfMeasure, hsnCode, gstRate) reported in validation error message.

results: CatalogServiceProductCrudTest: Tests run: 3, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0
CatalogServiceBulkUpsertTest: Tests run: 2, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0
keyObservations: Products support size variants with carton mappings (e.g., 1L:24, 4L:6)
Carton-size mappings are configurable per product via CatalogProductCartonSizeRequest
Bulk upsert enforces cartonSizes requirement with per-item validation
Search/filter supports brandId, color, size, active status with pagination
SKU auto-generated from brand code + sanitized product name + sequence number

steps.expected: Cost breakdown endpoint returns material, labor, overhead costs and total/unit cost from production log
steps.observed: Test passed: materialCostTotal=120.00, laborCostTotal=30.00, overheadCostTotal=25.00, totalCost=175.00, unitCost=17.50. ProductionLogId and productionCode correctly returned.

steps.expected: Cost breakdown includes packed batch details (FG batch, size, value, journal link) and raw material trace (RM movement, cost, journal link)
steps.observed: Test passed: totalCost=160.00, costComponents.packagingCost=25.00, costComponents.packedQuantity=5, costComponents.blendedUnitCost=32.0000. packedBatches[0]: packingRecordId=100, finishedGoodBatchId=300, finishedGoodCode=FG-WHITE-1L, sizeLabel=1L, totalValue=72.5000, journalEntryId=901. rawMaterialTrace[0]: referenceType=PACKING_RECORD, referenceId=PROD-77-PACK-100, totalCost=25.00, journalEntryId=900.

steps.expected: Graceful null handling for missing cost components and product name
steps.observed: Test passed: productName='Unknown' when product is null, materialCostTotal=null accepted, totalCost=7.00 (only laborCostTotal counted), empty packedBatches and rawMaterialTrace arrays.

steps.action: Run FactoryPackagingCostingIT end-to-end for full production→pack→dispatch cost chain
steps.expected: Full traceability: production log → RM consumption → FG batch with cost → packing → dispatch with COGS at batch cost
steps.observed: Test passed: Production log links to RM movements (journalEntryId), packing creates child FG batch with unitCost=57.5000, dispatch posts COGS journal at batch cost. All journal entries balanced. Complete chain: RM-BASE(100/unit)→ProductionLog(5500)→PackingRecord(+250 packaging)→FG batch(57.50/L)→Dispatch(COGS at 57.50/L).

results: ReportServiceCostBreakdownTest: Tests run: 3, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0
FactoryPackagingCostingIT: Tests run: 1, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0
keyObservations: CostBreakdownDto includes: productionLogId, productionCode, productName, materialCostTotal, laborCostTotal, overheadCostTotal, totalCost, unitCost
costComponents provides: packagingCost, packedQuantity, blendedUnitCost
packedBatches trace: packingRecordId→finishedGoodBatchId→finishedGoodCode→sizeLabel→totalValue→journalEntryId
rawMaterialTrace trace: referenceType→referenceId→totalCost→journalEntryId
Full chain verified: RM batches → ProductionLog → PackingRecord → FG batch → Dispatch COGS
All journal entries balanced at every step of the chain

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All manufacturing-polish assertions validated through targeted test execution. VAL-MFG-001 confirmed via FactoryPackagingCostingIT (RM consumption with FIFO, FG batch creation with calculated cost). VAL-MFG-002 confirmed via FactoryPackagingCostingIT + BulkPackingBomCostingIT (multi-size packing with BOM packaging material consumption and proportional cost allocation). VAL-MFG-003 confirmed via CatalogServiceProductCrudTest + CatalogServiceBulkUpsertTest (size variants with carton mappings, CRUD, bulk operations, validation). VAL-MFG-004 confirmed via ReportServiceCostBreakdownTest + FactoryPackagingCostingIT (full cost traceability from RM through production to packed SKUs with cost breakdown endpoint). Gate-fast baseline also passes: 380/380 tests, 0 failures.
